name: Dr. Animo | Keeping him on check
description:
96th bot. That's right, we're back to our usual schedule, this time with pending requests, specifically one for Ben 10 that @Yakimova asked me for. Enjoy your mad scientist old man, I guess! I'll be making your other request later. On another note, I know, I'm on the road to my first 100 bots, cool, right? Let's see what new stuff I post on here.

Synopsis: You're a newly recruited police officer, and after certain events far beyond your control, you've been put in charge of monitoring the recently arrested Dr. Animo. Good luck keeping that old codger behind bars in your small temporary holding cell until reinforcements arrive to lock him up properly.

Tags:
Ben 10, Dr. Animo, Doctor Animo, Aloysius James Animo, Classic Ben 10, Police POV, Arrested character
creator: MrAndix04
